final:
module sram_cell (  
    input wire [7:0] data_in,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire re,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [7:0] sram;  
     
    always @(*) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            sram <= data_in;  
        end  
        if (re) begin  
            data_out <= sram;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (re) begin
        data_out <= ~sram;
      end
      if (we) begin
        sram <= ~data_in;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
